items.label: Create Vault post
items.description: Create the Vault heist post for this subreddit

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Reset today's vault
items.description: Wipes today's vault + attempts for testing. Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Run rotation now
items.description: Closes today's vault and archives it immediately, for testing. Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.

items.label: [DEV ONLY] Reveal current combination
items.description: Toasts + logs today's real combination so the crack-reveal path can be tested live. Only works on the dev test subreddit — remove before a real launch.
